generic_name_fr: Soupe de Nouilles Instantanée au goût artificiel de boeuf
ingredients_debug: agents de traitement de la farine
ingredients_text: Noodles 90,9% [ WHEAT flour, palm oil, salt, flour treatment agents (sodium carbonate, triphosphates), stabiliser (potassium carbonate), thickener (guar gum), antioxidant (tocopherol-rich extract)], Seasoning powder 7,3% [salt, flavour enhancers (monosodium glutamate, disodium guanylate, disodium inosinate), soy sauce powder (SOYBEAN WHEAT, salt, maltodextrin), sugar, dextrose, beef flavourings (contain WHEAT, SOYA), spices (contain CELERY), beef extract powder (maltodextrin, beef extract), colour (ammonia caramel), leek, creaming powder (glucose syrup, palm oil, MILK proteins), yeast extract, rapeseed oil, anti-caking agent (silicon dioxide), beef fat powder (beef fat, beef broth), acidity regulator (citric acid)], Seasoning oil 1,8% (beef fat, rapeseed oil, flavouring).
